title: Sn(IV)-Porphyrin-Based Nanostructures Featuring Pd(II)-Mediated Supramolecular Arrays and Their Photocatalytic Degradation of Acid Orange 7 Dye

L2: IJMS 2022 Best Graphic Abstract Award winner
Sn(IV)-porphyrin/Pd(II) supramolecular arrays for photocatalytic dye degradation (86-91% in 90 min)
L3: Award-winning graphical abstract showing two porphyrin-based supramolecular architectures: 2D tetrameric (from SnP1 + trans-PdCl2) and 3D divergent array (from SnP2 + trans-PdCl2). Photocatalytic degradation of Acid Orange 7 dye achieves 86-91% efficiency in 90 min. CC BY 4.0 license.
